title: Health | Definition & Importance | Britannica
snippet: 4 days ago · Health, the extent of an individual’s continuing physical, emotional, mental, and social ability to cope with his or her environment.

title: Health - Wikipedia
snippet: In general, it refers to physical and emotional well-being, especially that associated with normal functioning of the human body, absent of disease, pain (including mental pain), or injury.

snippet: States are rolling out plans for their share of a $50 billion fund established by Congress to improve rural health care. In some states, the money may provoke rural hospitals to cut services.
